docs.text: Hi 👋, I'm Eric Julianto A long life-learner Hello, I'm Eric. Currently studying Hospitality and Tourism (third-year) at Universitas Bunda Mulia Ancol. I extremely motivated to constantly develop my skills and grow. Currently I'm studying about technologies such as web development, cross-platform development, artificial intelligence, internet of things, and many more. I started learning programming in 5th July 2021, and I choose to start learning from web development. I learnt from WPU, BWA, and other YouTube channels. Then one day my friend recommend me about Data Science, so I started learn it from DQLab. I once heard about Data Science from Joma, but I thought at that time I would never touch data science since my statistics and math skills are very weak. But now it's become a job that I really crave. There are so much things to learn in the field of Data Science and I'm motivated to learn as much as possible. I love to learning something new to improve my skills. My goal is to become an AI Specialist who masters Natural Language Processing, Computer Vision, and Reinforcement Learning. I also interest in MLOps and also Internet of Things. Since I'm focusing on MLOps for deeployment, I also learned about web and mobile development because those are the platform where people mostly use to implement machine learning. There are several my favorite tech stacks: Just in case if you want to contact me to ask any question or need to do consultation about technology, you can find me in these platform:
